title: Paraparapa Oru Ooru Lyrics Bangalore Naatkal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Paraparapa Oru Ooru Song Lyrics
Bangalore Naatkal
Singer: Ranjith
Lyrics: Viveka

Para parapaa Oru Ooru
Bangalore-u
paravasamaa moonu peru
thaarumaaru

kattupaadu ingae illai
kattipoda yaarum illai
pattaampoochiyaaga
maari parakkirom

thotti meenai
kondu vandhu
aatrukullae vittadhupol
thattuthadu maari idhai
rasikkirom

vali ellaam
mugam pudhusu
edhu maerkku
edhu kizhakku
mirandae parandhom.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates the joy of life and the vibrant atmosphere of Bangalore, reflecting a sense of happiness and togetherness.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Bangalore Naatkal, this song highlights the characters' joyful moments and their connection to the city, enhancing the film's lively narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Ranjith and composed by Gopi Sundar, known for his catchy and upbeat music style.

When was the song released?

Paraparapa Oru Ooru was released on January 24, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paraparapa Oru Ooru, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song reflects the vibrant spirit of Bangalore, making it a perfect anthem for parties and gatherings. It conveys a sense of togetherness and happiness, inviting listeners to embrace the moment. The upbeat tempo and engaging melody evoke feelings of excitement and fun, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paraparapa Oru Ooru from Bangalore Naatkal is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration. With Ranjith's captivating vocals and Gopi Sundar's infectious music, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the lively beats and let the rhythm take over your spirit!
stanzaMeanings: In Bangalore, there are three famous names that stand out.
A new sky is above us, like leaves in a stormy wind.
We have flown high, we have flown high.
Oh ho.. our place is Bangalore (repeats)
In Bangalore, there are three famous names that stand out.
There is no structure here, no one to hold it down, we have transformed like a butterfly.
Bringing fish and putting it in the pot, we enjoy it like it has been caught.
Something is happening in the heart, oh ohhh.
The beauty of the sun is unmatched. The path that is unseen is beautiful, beautiful, beautiful.
Oh ho.. our place is Bangalore (repeats)
Every pain has a new face, we have flown high from the east to the west.
Oh oh ... our place is Bangalore (repeats)
